titleStmt.title: SII 26.537: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 537. (A.R. No. 507 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Arikesari Parākrama pāṇḍyan*: Ś. 1369, Mithuṉa (Āṉi) 18, Saturday = 1447 A.D. June 15. The week-day was Thursday.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places, and it is also in Tamil verse.

It records that the king visited the temple at Teṉkāśi on Śaka 1368, Vaikāśi 10, śu. 10, Friday, Uttiram = 1446 A.D., May 6 and arranged for the performance of the ceremony of ploughing (kariḷśaṇai Skt. karshaṇam). Then on the date quoted above the construction of the central shrine of the Śiva temple at Tenkāśi was completed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śivamastu § Aṉpiṉuṭaṉ cakāttamāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟaṟupat
teṭṭataṉmel vaikācittiṅkaḷ maṉtiyati yīraintiṟ pūṟu
vapakka maruvu tecamiyil veḷḷivāran taṉṉil miṉati cūḻuttirunāḷ
mīṉattil vākaivelarikecari parākkirama makīpaṉ teṉticaiyiṟ kā
cinakarakkoyil kāṇacceṉṟu niṉṟu kariḻcaṇai tāṉ ceyvit
tāṉe § Acaivutikaḻ cakāttamāyirattu muṉṉūṟṟaṟupat
toṉpatiṉ meṟcol mituṉa ñāyiṟṟiṭai maruvutiyati patiṉe
ṭṭiṟpata � ḷiṟ caṉivārantaṉṉil miṉattil maṭai
ṭaiya raitteṉkācic civālaiyattiṉuḷḷamaittu teḷḷamutamuṭ
ṭiṉāṉe kaikataṟpakavaṉ ka ṭantu
yakkattaku miṉvantuyka
Digital edition of SII 26.537 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
